'''Oph Nar Dinnid''' was a [[Lyunesi]] [[comm handler]] on the run from [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] after a huge [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head following an affair with a member of a supreme liege-lord's family in the [[Narrant system/Legends|Narrant system]]. He was murdered on [[Circumtore/Legends|Circumtore]] by [[Gheeta]] while seeking shelter with [[Shell Hutts]] before the team of bounty hunters led by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] could arrive to capture him; his body was found in a state of decay several weeks after his [[Death/Legends|death]].
